batch_3_issue_log.details: joico.com returns HTTP 403 from cloud agent environment (Cloudflare). No official PDF mirror found on CosmoProf/SalonCentric.
Official Color Guide publishes palette JPEGs on Adobe DAM without extractable shade codes or companion PDF.
Full digit tone legend lives in pro-gated flipbook at /pro/product-knowledge-guide/; combo-code mappings derived from public product page descriptions instead.
WooCommerce SKU (internal) explicitly not used as shade_code; manufacturer-facing codes taken from URL slug / printed product name.
